channel.title: ssh on pascal.heidmann.io | developing in Hamburg... ⚓
channel.description: Recent content in ssh on pascal.heidmann.io | developing in Hamburg... ⚓

item.title: SSH Host Unknown
item.description: Problem Your ssh config Includes another config file with hosts. When trying to connect to a host in that referenced config the host is unknown. Example Host example.tld Hostname example.tld User myuser Include ~/some-other-ssh-config Solution Put include statements first as those will be interpreted as sub-configs to the Host entry. Modified example Include ~/some-other-ssh-config Host example.tld Hostname example.tld User myuser
